Setup
SirJackovich chose heads for the opening coin flip.
SirJackovich won the coin toss.
SirJackovich decided to go second.
SirJackovich drew 7 cards for the opening hand.
- 7 drawn cards.
   • Mankey, Mankey, Risky Ruins, Basic Fighting Energy, Primeape, Annihilape, Fighting Gong
OpponentFour drew 7 cards for the opening hand.
- 7 drawn cards.
   • Iron Hands ex, Energy, Switch, Nest Ball, Iono, Boss's Orders, Arven
SirJackovich played Mankey to the Active Spot.
SirJackovich played Mankey to the Bench.
OpponentFour played Iron Hands ex to the Active Spot.

OpponentFour's Turn
OpponentFour drew a card.
OpponentFour ended their turn.

SirJackovich's Turn
SirJackovich drew Basic Fighting Energy.
SirJackovich played Risky Ruins to the Stadium spot.
Risky Ruins was activated.
- SirJackovich put 2 damage counters on SirJackovich's Mankey.
SirJackovich evolved Mankey to Primeape in the Active Spot.
SirJackovich evolved Primeape to Annihilape in the Active Spot.
SirJackovich's Annihilape used Impact Blow on OpponentFour's Iron Hands ex for 280 damage.
OpponentFour's Iron Hands ex was Knocked Out!
SirJackovich took 2 Prize cards.

SirJackovich wins.
